samples.text: All squares are rectangles. All rectangles are polygons. Are squares polygons?
Every member of squares is among rectangles. Every member of rectangles is among polygons. Does it follow that squares are polygons?
All regular quadrilaterals are right-angled quadrilaterals. All right-angled quadrilaterals are polygons. Are regular quadrilaterals polygons?
polygons include all rectangles. rectangles include all squares. Therefore, are squares polygons?
All squares are rectangles. All rectangles are polygons. The meeting started at noon. Are squares polygons?
